name: NioLeads
tagline: Find business emails by name and company domain
description: Find a person's business email address from their name and company domain, and check your NioLeads account credit balance. Requires a NioLeads API key generated from the account's Integrations page.

auth.hint: Generate an API key on the NioLeads dashboard Integrations page, then send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AUTH_KEY>.

tools.name: find_email
tools.description: Find a business email address from a person's first name, last name, and company domain or name.

params.name: domainOrCompany
params.description: Email domain or company name, e.g. example.com.

tools.name: get_credits
tools.description: Retrieve the current available credit balance for the authenticated NioLeads account.
